---
title: "00 · Introduction"
subtitle: "Tier 4 — Pre-Calculus and Calculus · Grade 12 · The two great ideas of calculus — derivatives and integrals — and the algebra of vectors that lifts geometry into 3D"
---

## What this tier is for

For three centuries the great unsolved problem of mathematics was
**describing change** — the speed of a falling stone, the area under a
curve, the slope of a tangent line. Newton and Leibniz solved it in
the 1660s by inventing **calculus**: a single framework that tames
limits, derivatives, and integrals.

By the end of Tier 4 you can:

- Compute **limits** and recognise **continuity**.
- Compute **derivatives** of polynomials, trig, exp, and log
  functions; apply the chain rule.
- Use derivatives for **optimisation**, **related rates**, and
  **linear approximation**.
- Compute **definite integrals** as areas; apply the **Fundamental
  Theorem of Calculus**.
- Solve simple **differential equations**.
- Work with **vectors** in 2D and 3D, including **dot** and **cross**
  products.
- Describe motion with **parametric equations**.

## The lessons

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[01 · Limits] --> B[02 · Continuity]
    A --> C[03 · Derivative]
    C --> D[04 · Differentiation Rules]
    D --> E[05 · Trig/Exp/Log Derivatives]
    D --> F[06 · Optimisation]
    D --> G[07 · Related Rates]
    A --> H[08 · Definite Integral]
    C --> I[09 · Fundamental Theorem]
    H --> I
    I --> J[10 · Integration Techniques]
    I --> K[11 · Integration Applications]
    C --> L[12 · Differential Equations]
    J --> L
    M[13 · Vectors] --> N[14 · Dot/Cross Product]
    M --> O[15 · Parametric Equations]
    D --> O
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Limits — The Idea of Approach**](01-limits/index.qmd)
2. [**02 · Continuity**](02-continuity/index.qmd)
3. [**03 · The Derivative — Slope of a Curve**](03-derivative/index.qmd)
4. [**04 · Differentiation Rules**](04-differentiation-rules/index.qmd)
5. [**05 · Derivatives of Trig, Exp, and Log Functions**](05-derivatives-trig-exp-log/index.qmd)
6. [**06 · Applications of Derivatives — Optimisation**](06-optimization/index.qmd)
7. [**07 · Related Rates and Linear Approximation**](07-related-rates/index.qmd)
8. [**08 · The Definite Integral**](08-definite-integral/index.qmd)
9. [**09 · The Fundamental Theorem of Calculus**](09-fundamental-theorem/index.qmd)
10. [**10 · Techniques of Integration**](10-integration-techniques/index.qmd)
11. [**11 · Applications of Integration**](11-integration-applications/index.qmd)
12. [**12 · Differential Equations — Introduction**](12-differential-equations/index.qmd)
13. [**13 · Vectors in 2D and 3D**](13-vectors-2d-3d/index.qmd)
14. [**14 · Dot Product and Cross Product**](14-dot-cross-product/index.qmd)
15. [**15 · Parametric Equations and Curves**](15-parametric-equations/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
